title: Activation: Reloaded
description: Makes it much easier to tell whether activation components have been powered.
body:
# Activation: Reloaded

*Adds 3D redstone indentation to powered models of pressure plates, buttons, and levers, making their activation state instantly recognizable. The lever model also features a redesigned non-powered state for better visual clarity.*

## Features
  - Visually distinct powered pressure plate and button indicators
  - Redesigned lever models for both powered and non-powered states
  - Corrected pressure plate and button representations in GUI
  - Refined pressure plate and button textures for better aesthetics
  - Tripwire hook remodeled and retextured for pixel consistency
  - Tripwire string redesigned for improved visibility

## Installation

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
